questions.question: Who was nominated by SEBI as the panel head of the principal market advisory committee on data?
questions.explanation: Recently , VS Pathania: He was appointed as 24th Director General (DG) of the Indian Coast Guard. He has replaced Krishnaswamy Natarajan who retired from the post.

questions.question: According to a Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Working Paper, the optimal hedge ratio for the External Commercial Borrowings (ECBs) raised by firms in India is estimated at _________% .
questions.explanation: According to a Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Working Paper, the optimal hedge ratio for the External Commercial Borrowings (ECBs) raised by firms in India is estimated at 63 per cent for the periods of high volatility in the foreign exchange (forex/FX) market.

questions.question: Who was appointed as Chairperson of the National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development (NaBFID) ?
questions.explanation: The government of India has appointed K V Kamath as chairperson of the National Bank for Financing Infrastructure and Development (NaBFID).

questions.question: Which e-commerce platform has signed a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with the Foundation for Innovation and Technology Transfer (FITT) to conduct research in the areas of social commerce, product recommendations to sellers and resellers, and the consumer product exploration journey?
questions.explanation: The e-commerce giant Flipkart has signed MoU with Foundation for Innovation and Technology Transfer (FITT).

questions.question: The unemployment rate in India in January 2022 fell sharply to ____%, according to the data from the economic think-tank, the Centre for Monitoring Indian Economy (CMIE).
questions.explanation: The unemployment rate in India in January 2022 fell sharply to 6.57%, according to the data from the economic think-tank, the Centre for Monitoring Indian Economy (CMIE).

questions.question: CARS24 Financial Services Private Ltd has partnered with which insurance company to provide motor insurance to used car buyers?
questions.explanation: The Kotak Mahindra General Insurance Company Ltd has partnered with CARS24 Financial Services Private Ltd.

questions.question: On which day is the 46th Civil Accounts Day observed?
questions.explanation: The 46th Civil Accounts Day has celebrated on 2nd March 2022 at Dr Ambedkar International Centre, Janpath, New Delhi. Minister for Finance & Corporate Affairs Smt. Nirmala Sitharaman is the Chief Guest of the occasion.

questions.question: Which insurance company in India has launched the ‘FG Dog Health Cover’?

options.label: D
options.text: Future General India Insurance Company Limited (FGII)

answer.label: D
answer.text: Future General India Insurance Company Limited (FGII)

questions.explanation: The Future Generali India Insurance Company Limited (FGII) has launched ‘FG Dog Health Cover’ which is a health insurance for pet dogs. It is launched along with an industry-first ‘emergency pet minding’ cover. The policy provides insurance cover to the dogs aged between 6 months to 4 years for giant breeds and 7 years for small, medium, and large dog breeds. The premium amount starts at Rs 323 per month.

questions.question: What is the full form of FATF ?
questions.explanation: Global terror financing watchdog Financial Action Task Force (FATF) has retained Pakistan on its ‘Grey List’ of countries. In a briefing, FATF president Marcus Pleyer also said that three new countries Turkey, Jordan, and Mali have also been added to the Grey List. In June this year, the FATF had retained Pakistan on its ‘Grey List’ for failing to check money laundering, leading to terror financing.

questions.question: Recently who named as member of UN’s Advisory Board ?
questions.explanation: United Nations (UN) Secretary-General, Antonio Guterres has announced the appointment of Indian development economist Jayati Ghosh as a member of the UN’s newly established Advisory Board on Effective Multilateralism. The new advisory board will be asked to build on the ideas in Our Common Agenda including the centrality of women and girls, and the need to take into account the interests of young people and future generations to make concrete suggestions for more effective multilateral arrangements across a range of key global issues.
